title: X Hires Coinbase Vet Ahead of X Money Launch
message_html: X Hires Coinbase Vet Ahead of X Money Launch ...
snippet: X has hired a new design lead with a background in the cryptocurrency space. Benji Taylor, formerly head of design at Coinbase’s Base blockchain network, announced his new role in a social media post Wednesday (March 25).
